props.ChoiceText: Hunger, anger, and exhaustion turned into open disorder, and you were left to live with what followed.
props.ChoiceBio: A broken riot taught you how easily laborers can be crushed once they stand together openly.

0.TransitionText: Because a broken riot taught you how easily laborers can be crushed once they stand together openly, defeat could harden into organized revolt as a revolutionary.
0.TransitionPrompt: This broken riot could carry you into revolutionary politics, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a broken riot taught you how easily laborers can be crushed once they stand together openly, hard work could not keep you fed, and you crossed into crime.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a broken riot taught you how easily laborers can be crushed once they stand together openly, your life remained one of burden, wages, and endurance.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Laborer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
